title: What is the purpose of "New Project"?
excerpt: So I’m pretty new to monday and this video does a nice job breaking down the hierarchy structure of various elements in the monday.com platform, but there is no mention of the “Project” element type. What purpose does th…

posts.author: BKD (BD)
posts.cookedHtml: So I’m pretty new to monday and this video does a nice job breaking down the hierarchy structure of various elements in the monday.com platform, but there is no mention of the “Project” element type. What purpose does the “New Project” option serve that isn’t already covered by one of the listed elements of Workspace > Folder > Sub Folder > Dashboard - Board - Workdoc.

posts.author: gaco.com.au (Elijah Noonan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Project can be an item or a board.

I’m not sure I fully understand your post if you could kindly clarify and I may be able to reply a little better!

posts.author: BKD (BD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure thing Elijah, take a look at the attached screen snippet. After hitting the ‘add item to workspace’ button, these are the available options.

Trying to better understand the purpose of ‘New Project’ in comparison to a ‘New Folder’ or ‘New Board’ within a folder.
